name: EVERSPIN TECHNOLOGIES INC.
business: EVERSPIN TECHNOLOGIES INC. is a pioneer in the commercialization of Magnetoresistive Random Access Memory (MRAM) technology, offering Toggle MRAM, STT-MRAM, TMR sensors, licensing, and foundry services to customers in industrial, medical, automotive/transportation, aerospace/defense, and data center markets. For the year ended December 31, 2025, the company reported revenue of $55.2 million and a net loss of $0.6 million.

exposures.sentence: These high density, high performance persistent memories are delivering significant value to SSD, Persistent Memory Cards, Fabric Accelerator, and other applications in the data center market.
These high performance, non-volatile memories are designed primarily to address applications in the industrial, medical, automotive/transportation, and data center markets.

They are ideal for use in electronic systems where data persistence and integrity, low power, low latency, and security are paramount, such as industrial IoT, artificial intelligence (AI), network/enterprise infrastructure, process automation and control, aeronautics/avionics, and medical and gaming applications.
These high performance, non-volatile memories are designed primarily to address applications in the industrial, medical, automotive/transportation, and data center markets.

These services allow aerospace and satellite electronic system manufacturers to integrate our EAR99 technology that is able to withstand exposure to the levels of radiation encountered in avionics and space applications by virtue of such technology being magnetic rather than electrical charge based which would be susceptible to alpha particles.
